titles.title: This Is Like Heaven to Me

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We find many people who can’t understand Why we are so happy and free; We’ve crossed over Jordan to Canaan’s fair land And this is like Heaven to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, this is like Heaven to me, (Praise God!) Yes, this is like Heaven to me; I’ve crossed over Jordan to Canaan’s fair land, And this is like Heaven to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, when I get happy, I sing and I shout, The devil don’t believe It, I see; But I’m filled with the Spirit, there isn’t a doubt, And that’s what’s the matter with me.
